language.welcomeIntro: Welcome to the ThinkPad UltraNav Setup program. This program will install the ThinkPad UltraNav Driver on your computer.
language.eulaHeaderTitle: Review the terms of the license agreement
language.eulaNoButton: I do not accept this agreement
language.installHeaderTitle: Please wait while Setup finishes installing the driver.
language.finishText: Setup has finished installing the ThinkPad UltraNav driver.

language.dpinstTitle: ThinkPad UltraNav 驅動程式安裝
language.welcomeIntro: 歡迎使用 ThinkPad UltraNav 安裝程式。該程式將在您的電腦上安裝 ThinkPad UltraNav 驅驅動程式。
language.installHeaderTitle: 安裝程式正在完成安裝驅動程式，請稍候。
language.finishText: 安裝程式已完成安裝 ThinkPad UltraNav 驅動程式。

language.dpinstTitle: ThinkPad UltraNav 驱动程序安装
language.welcomeIntro: 欢迎使用 ThinkPad UltraNav 安装程序。该程序将在您的计算机上安装 ThinkPad UltraNav 驱驱动程序。
language.installHeaderTitle: 安装程序正在完成安装驱动程序，请稍候。
language.finishText: 安装程序已完成安装 ThinkPad UltraNav 驱动程序。

language.dpinstTitle: ThinkPad UltraNav 驅動程式安裝
language.welcomeIntro: 歡迎使用 ThinkPad UltraNav 安裝程式。該程式將在您的電腦上安裝 ThinkPad UltraNav 驅驅動程式。
language.installHeaderTitle: 安裝程式正在完成安裝驅動程式，請稍候。
language.finishText: 安裝程式已完成安裝 ThinkPad UltraNav 驅動程式。

language.dpinstTitle: Instalação do driver do ThinkPad UltraNav
language.welcomeIntro: Bem-vindo(a) ao programa de instalação do ThinkPad UltraNav. Este programa instalará o driver do ThinkPad UltraNav em seu computador.
language.eulaHeaderTitle: Revisar os termos do contrato de licença
language.installHeaderTitle: Aguarde enquanto o programa conlui a instalação do driver.
language.finishText: O programa terminou a instalação do driver do ThinkPad UltraNav.

language.welcomeIntro: Добро пожаловать в программу установки ThinkPad UltraNav. Эта программа установит на ваш компьютер драйвер ThinkPad UltraNav.
ThinkPad UltraNav-installationsprogram. Dette program installerer ThinkPad UltraNav-styreprogrammet på computeren.
language.installHeaderTitle: Vent venligst mens installationsprogrammet udfører driverinstallationen.

language.welcomeIntro: Welkom bij het setupprogramma van ThinkPad UltraNav. Met dit programma installeert u het ThinkPad UltraNav-stuurprogramma op uw computer.
language.eulaHeaderTitle: Lees de voorwaarden van de licentieovereenkomst door
language.installHeaderTitle: De installatie van het stuurprogramma wordt voltooid. Even geduld a.u.b.
language.finishText: Setup heeft de installatie van het ThinkPad UltraNav- stuurprogrammavoltooid.

language.welcomeIntro: ThinkPad UltraNav -asennusohjelman aloitus. Tämä ohjelma asentaa tietokoneeseen ThinkPad UltraNav -ajurin.
language.installHeaderTitle: Odota, kunnes asennusohjelma saa ohjaimen asennettua.

language.welcomeIntro: Bienvenue dans le programme d'installation du pilote ThinkPad UltraNav. Ce programme installera le pilote de ThinkPad UltraNav sur votre ordinateur.
language.eulaHeaderTitle: Consulter les modalités du contrat de licence
language.installHeaderTitle: Veuillez attendre que l'installation du pilote soit terminée.
language.finishText: L'installation du pilote ThinkPad UltraNav est terminée.

language.welcomeIntro: Willkommen beim Installationsprogramm für den ThinkPad-UltraNav-Treiber. Mit diesem Programm wird der Treiber auf dem Computer installiert.
language.eulaHeaderTitle: Lesen Sie die Bedingungen des Lizenzvertrags
language.installHeaderTitle: Bitte warten Sie, bis der Treiber vollständig installiert ist.
language.finishText: IDie Installation des ThinkPad-UltraNav-Treibers ist abgeschlossen.

language.welcomeIntro: Benvenuti nel programma di impostazione di ThinkPad UltraNav Driver. Questo programma installerà il driver UltraNav sul computer.
language.eulaHeaderTitle: Rileggere le condizioni del contratto di licenza
language.installHeaderTitle: Si prega di attendere che l'applicazione completi l'installazione del driver.
language.finishText: Il programma di impostazione ha terminato l'installazione di ThinkPad UltraNav Driver.

language.welcomeIntro: Velkommen til installeringsprogrammet for ThinkPad UltraNav. Dette programmet installerer ThinkPad UltraNav-driveren på maskinen.
language.installHeaderTitle: Vent litt mens installasjonsprogrammet avslutter driverinstalleringen.
language.finishText: Installeringen av ThinkPad UltraNav-driveren er ferdig.

language.dpinstTitle: Instalación del controlador de ThinkPad UltraNav
language.welcomeIntro: Bienvenido al programa Instalación de ThinkPad UltraNav. Este programa instalará el controlador de ThinkPad UltraNav en el sistema
language.eulaHeaderTitle: Revise los términos del contrato de licencia
language.installHeaderTitle: Espere mientras el programa termina de instalar el controlador.
language.finishText: Ha finalizado la instalación del controlador de ThinkPad UltraNav.

language.welcomeIntro: Välkommet till installationsprogrammet för ThinkPad UltraNav. Programmet installerar ThinkPad UltraNav-drivrutinen på datorn.
language.eulaHeaderTitle: Läs igenom villkoren i detta licensavtal
language.finishText: Installationsprogrammet har slutfört installationen av ThinkPad UltraNav-drivrutinen.

language.dpinstTitle: ThinkPad UltraNavドライバーのインストール
language.welcomeIntro: ThinkPad UltraNavドライバー セットアップ プログラムへようこそ。このプログラムはコンピュータに ThinkPad UltraNavドライバーをインストールします。
language.eulaHeaderTitle: 使用許諾書の条項を確認する
language.installHeaderTitle: ﾄﾞﾗｲﾊﾞのｲﾝｽﾄｰﾙが終わるまでお待ちください。
language.finishText: ThinkPad UltraNavドライバーのインストールが終わりました。
